a:T150b,<div class="question">
<p>A charge +<em>Q</em> and a charge −2<em>Q</em> are a distance 3<em>x</em> apart. Point P is on the line joining the charges, at a distance <em>x</em> from +<em>Q</em>.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="display:block;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;"/></p>
<p>The magnitude of the electric field produced at P by the charge +<em>Q</em> alone is <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mi>E</mi></math>.</p>
<p>What is the total electric field at P?</p>
<p><br/>A.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mfrac><mi>E</mi><mn>2</mn></mfrac></math> to the right</p>
<p>B.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mfrac><mi>E</mi><mn>2</mn></mfrac></math> to the left</p>
<p>C.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mfrac><mrow><mn>3</mn><mi>E</mi></mrow><mn>2</mn></mfrac></math> to the right</p>
<p>D.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mfrac><mrow><mn>3</mn><mi>E</mi></mrow><mn>2</mn></mfrac></math> to the left</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/physics/topic/5/","children":["← back to ","Physics"," topic ","5"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"21N.1.SL.TZ0.18"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Physics"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"21N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","5-1-electric-fields"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>C</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n[N/A]\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
